generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for generated contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assume and guarantee labels for clarity
Use eq and const for variable declarations
anti_patterns: Do not use unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations
Do not mix assumed and actual types in expressions
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
